svg.title: research-git capture and recall workflow in Codex
svg.desc: Codex automatically captures the model-specific scaling invariant behind a real KTransformers FlashInfer MLA precision fix, then recalls it during a later reapplication.

g.text: › Fix FlashInfer MLA precision and validate it against the Torch reference.
• Edited attention.py └ use each layer's self_attn.softmax_scale
• Compared FlashInfer output with Torch reference ✓ parity
• research-git automatically captured the completed change
• Proposed flashinfer-mla-model-scale — Preserve model-specific MLA scaling.
? Keep this Capsule, or discard it?
› $research-git:rgit-recall Re-enable FlashInfer MLA for long-context prefill.
• Found invariant: use the model's scale, not q_head_dim ** -0.5
• Applied Capsule to the current long-context implementation
• Preserved generation quality while restoring FlashInfer MLA.

text.tspan: Re-enable FlashInfer MLA for long-context prefill.
